title: Simple Dye
description: Command to dye things extremely specific colors
body:
Easy commands for Dye-ing dyeable armors

| Permission | Default | Command |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| `sd.reload` | OP | `/sdreload`|
| `sd.dye.basic` | OP | `/dye simple <color>` |
| `sd.dye.rgb` | OP | `/dye rgb <#aabbcc \| aabbcc>` |
